column2: Removes the link ID from the current shape as well as all linked shapes with the same ID.
Removes the link ID from the current shape. All other shapes with the same ID remain linked.
Enables inserting editing notes on slides. The `ppt_notes` feature must be installed.
Enables inserting updatable slide thumbnails. The `ppt_thumbnails` feature must be installed.
Enables displaying simple statistics for a quick check of number-heavy slides. The `ppt_statistics` feature must be installed.
Enables saving custom formats/styles in galleries for later reuse. The `ppt_customformats` feature must be installed.
Enables the circular arrangement of shapes. The `ppt_circlify` feature must be installed.
Enables the table-shaped arrangement of shapes. The `ppt_shapetables` feature must be installed.
Search again for shapes by position and size to add more shapes to this link.

Replaces the image with a shape with image fill that can be made natively transparent. The existing image is exported and then deleted, i.e. any cropped areas are lost and image formats cannot be undone.
Replaces the text of a text box in shapes. This can be used e.g. to convert an icon font into real icons.
Replaces the current slide master (templates and design) in the presentation with the slide master from the selected file.
Replaces merged cells within the current selection with the horizontal alignment 'Center across selection', provided the merged cells consist of one row and were previously centered.
Create a circle with segments or chevrons.

Create a tracker from the selected shapes.\nThe shape style for highlights is determined from the first selected shape (usually top left). The shape style for all other shapes is determined from the second selected shape.
Create a horizontal connection area between the vertical sides (left/right) of two shapes.
Create a vertical connection area between the horizontal sides (top/bottom) of two shapes.
Create a process arrow with header shape. The header shape can be arranged appropriately within the process arrow via the context menu of the header shape.
Creates a list of all sheets of this workbook in a new sheet.
Creates a list of all data validations of the current sheet in a new sheet.
Creates a list of all document properties of this workbook in a new sheet.
Creates a list of all comments of the current sheet in a new sheet.
Creates a list of all names of this workbook in a new sheet.
Creates a list of all conditional formats of the current sheet in a new sheet.
Creates a list of all open workbooks incl. path in a new sheet.
Capitalize First Letter Of Each Word
Capitalize the first letter of the sentence for all linked shapes
Capitalize the first letter of the sentence
Capitalize the first letter of the word for all linked shapes
First shape in the slide deck
No special Unicode font is used, but the theme's default font.
An attempt is made to approximately determine the current radius, start angle and options of the selected shapes
Export the workbook's color scheme as an XML file.
Export the workbook's font scheme as an XML file.
Change the color of a Harvey ball
Remove feature folder »{}« from BKT configuration
Define which reference object the shapes should be aligned to
Set the page per group and hide groups.
Save slides into individual PowerPoint files.
Delete the slide reference of all thumbnails in the presentation and convert thumbnails into images
Delete the slide reference and thereby convert the thumbnail into a normal image.
Apply slide master to the selected slides.
Apply slide master to the entire presentation.
Add slide master to the current presentation.
Pick up format from the selected shape into the clipboard.
Select format for inserting the thumbnail
The format tab is hidden to prevent automatic switching to the tab when creating shapes.
Set the formatting of all linked shapes to the size of the selected shape.
Replace formulas in all selected cells with their respective values. Cells without formulas remain unchanged.
Functions to manipulate shape points, duplicate shapes, and convert text into symbol/graphic
Functions to send shapes to the back
Functions to bring shapes to the front
Functions to clean up all slides of the presentation
Functions to swap shape position, size or formatting
Insert slide numbering that does not change when slides are reordered.\n\nHelpful for capturing notes when reordering during a discussion of the slide deck.
Insert a checkbox symbol as a toggle shape that can be changed interactively.

Insert a Harvey ball that can be configured for color/fill level.

Color and fill level can be configured via the context menu and context tab; in the tab, percentage values are also possible.

A Harvey ball shape is a group of a circle and a pie shape.
Insert a checkerboard of standard shapes
Insert a sticker shape in the top right of the current slide with the text BACKUP.
Insert a sticker shape in the top right of the current slide with the text CONFIDENTIAL.
Insert a sticker shape in the top right of the current slide with the text DRAFT.
Insert a sticker shape in the top right of the current slide with the text FOR DISCUSSION.
Insert a sticker shape in the top right of the current slide with the text ILLUSTRATIVE.
Insert a sticker shape in the top right of the current slide with a self-defined text.
Insert a status traffic light. The status color of the traffic light can be configured via the context dialog.
Insert a table of standard shapes
Insert a text box with a line at the bottom of the shape on the current slide.
Inserts a standard header (file name and worksheet name) and footer (page x of y) for all selected sheets.
Inserts all columns (per selection range) into the first column, separated by commas
Inserts all rows (per selection range) into the first row, separated by line breaks
Inserts all cells into the active cell, separated by line breaks
Automatically appends an updatable slide number at the end of the text to all linked shapes
Inserts the clipboard content as formulas only into visible cells. Hidden or filtered-out cells are skipped.
Inserts the clipboard content as values only into visible cells. Hidden or filtered-out cells are skipped.
Inserts the clipboard content only into visible cells. Hidden or filtered-out cells are skipped.
Inserts an editing note in the top right of the slide incl. author and date.
Inserts a numbering shape for each selected shape. Numbering and styling according to the selection. Selected shapes are numbered according to the selection order.
Adds 3 additional shape points to each side that can be used for connectors. Works only with rectangles.
Merges the selected shapes into one shape. The text of all shapes is taken over and concatenated.
Change the fill level of a Harvey ball
Agenda slides are created for sub-items of an agenda item (indent level > 1)
Copy selected slide as an updatable thumbnail
The desired shape arrangement is achieved by positioning shapes
